name: R C Prime Transportation
districts_or_customers: Listed on NJ DOE school bus contractor codes; Bergen County area (Little Ferry/Hackensack); specific districts not disclosed publicly
recent_news: Appears in NJ DOE 2020-21 and 2021-22 school bus contractor code lists, suggesting continuing active operations as a small contractor
fit_notes: Very small Bergen County NJ contractor (~$1.1M rev, 20 employees) owned by Rosa Salvador. Sub-scale even for tuck-in but in dense Summit NJ footprint; only attractive as a route-bolt-on if Summit already operates in Bergen/Hudson.

name: St Andrew School Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Middlesex County, NJ (East Brunswick area); specific district contracts not surfaced in public sources
recent_news: No press, no website, no NJSBCA directory hit surfaced; small operator with limited digital footprint
fit_notes: Very small Middlesex County NJ operator (~$1.0M rev, 20 employees) with minimal public footprint. The 'St Andrew' name and Nora Morkos (likely Coptic/Egyptian-American) suggests potential parochial/private-school niche. Marginal scale for Summit tuck-in but could be a small route bolt-on.

name: Five Star School Trnsprtn Inc
districts_or_customers: Long Beach, CA area; possible private/charter school customers; no LBUSD contract confirmed (LBUSD runs its own transportation department)
recent_news: No confirmed news, website, or FMCSA hit at the Long Beach Blvd address. The FMCSA 'Five Star Transportation Inc' (USDOT 2936249) is a Las Vegas freight operation, not this entity
fit_notes: Small ~$1M CA operator with minimal digital footprint at 3701 Long Beach Blvd. Likely a private-school/charter shuttle micro-operator rather than a district contract holder (LBUSD self-operates). Too small for Summit tuck-in; CA also expansion-state not core Summit footprint.

name: Rodgers Inc Which Will Do Bus
districts_or_customers: Warren County, MO area; possible Warren County R-III district route service; not confirmed in public sources
recent_news: 23335 Rodgers Dr in Warrenton MO now hosts 'Marquis Selections' per Yelp - suggests the Rodgers operation may be dormant, sold, or repurposed. The FMCSA 'Warren D Rodgers' (USDOT 1599571) is a 1-truck freight operation in Clinton MO, not this entity
fit_notes: Name 'Rodgers Inc Which Will Do Bus[iness As]' is a dba truncation artifact from a state filing. Address now associated with a different business (Marquis Selections), raising possibility this entity is defunct or rebranded. Need direct outreach to confirm if it still operates school buses; if active, it's a small ~35-employee Warren County family op that could be a Summit MO/expansion tuck-in - but flag as possibly dissolved.

name: Wilson Transport
districts_or_customers: Tioga County, PA schools (Mansfield area); company also operates a CDL/school bus driver training program
recent_news: USDOT 498132 active; SAFER shows 12 power units, 26 drivers, intrastate passenger/school student carriage, zero crashes in last 24 months, last safety review 2009. Active Facebook page (wilson.transport.2025) indicates ongoing operations
fit_notes: Confirmed independent family-owned Tioga County PA school bus contractor with ~12 buses, 26 drivers, clean safety record, and ancillary CDL training revenue. Owner Tricia Hall present at least since 2009 review - potential succession candidate. Small scale but rural PA fits Summit footprint; attractive as a low-risk route tuck-in given clean safety, owner-operator profile, and bolt-on CDL training asset.
